title: Fortnite Melees Weapons
description: Weapons are from Fortnite, They have the quirk of insane movility, like all greats melees
body:
**MOD COMPATIBLE WITH BETTER COMBAT**
Currently has 4 weapons, but don't be dissapointed, with time not only will i add more, but i will accept requests, making this a more interactive experience. as one now, i have added 2 to the original 2.

Weapons are from Fortnite, They have the quirk of insane movility, like all greats melees, are kinda broken but if anyone wants a more balanced version you are free to ask.

I promise great quality and fun, you can see in the images that they are, in fact completely 3D modeled, but they get better, with better combat they have special animations (Sound included) that intend to recreate the same feeling that the Fortnite ones give.

they all have special abilities based on their original game counterparts, have crafting recipes and are in tab in creative.
 

SIDEWAYS SCYTHE
Has a 5 combo attack with special sound, fully 3D modeled, is craftable, has a dashing ability and a jumping ability, one the better weapons from this mod as of now.
NEW INFINITY BLADE ADDED!

Has a 2 combo attack with special sound, fully 3D modeled, is craftable, has a jumping ability, probably the hardest weapon to craft  from this mod as of now, affect the player just like the in-game one does, adding extra health and regeneration.
